requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — National Energy-Saving Programmes for Household Refrigerators (Uzbekistan)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——乌兹别克斯坦家用电冰箱国家节能计划
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——烏茲別克家用電冰箱國家節能計畫

summary.en: Uzbekistan governs household-appliance energy efficiency through national energy-saving programmes and policy measures rather than through the EU Energy Efficiency Index (EEI) / EPREL system. Energy efficiency for refrigerating appliances is addressed via O'zDSt standards (which adopt IEC 62552-series measurement methods and legacy GOST energy-class frameworks) together with national programmes promoting energy-efficient appliances, and is administered in coordination with O'zStandart and the responsible energy authorities. Where an energy class or minimum-performance threshold applies, it is typically expressed on a GOST-derived class scale and demonstrated using IEC 62552 measurement methods. Importers and manufacturers should confirm whether a specific minimum energy-performance standard (MEPS) or energy-labelling obligation currently applies to imported refrigerators, as national programme requirements evolve.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦通过国家节能计划和政策措施管理家用器具能效，而非采用欧盟能效指数（EEI）/EPREL体系。制冷器具的能效通过O'zDSt标准（采用IEC 62552系列测量方法及沿用的GOST能效等级框架）及推广节能器具的国家计划处理，并与O'zStandart及相关能源主管部门协调管理。在适用能效等级或最低性能门槛时，通常以GOST衍生的等级体系表示，并采用IEC 62552测量方法证明。进口商和制造商应确认当前是否对进口电冰箱适用特定的最低能效标准（MEPS）或能效标识义务，因国家计划要求会不断演进。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克通過國家節能計畫和政策措施管理家用器具能效，而非採用歐盟能效指數（EEI）/EPREL體系。製冷器具的能效通過O'zDSt標準（採用IEC 62552系列測量方法及沿用的GOST能效等級框架）及推廣節能器具的國家計畫處理，並與O'zStandart及相關能源主管部門協調管理。在適用能效等級或最低性能門檻時，通常以GOST衍生的等級體系表示，並採用IEC 62552測量方法證明。進口商和製造商應確認當前是否對進口電冰箱適用特定的最低能效標準（MEPS）或能效標識義務，因國家計畫要求會不斷演進。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan national energy-saving / energy-efficiency programmes — policy framework promoting energy-efficient household appliances (administered with O'zStandart and the responsible energy authorities)
O'zDSt adoption of IEC 62552-series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (energy-performance measurement basis)
Legacy GOST energy-class framework — where a GOST-derived energy-efficiency class applies to refrigerating appliances

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient to Grade 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label (CEL) administered under the NDRC/SAMR labelling system; the underlying test methodology (GB/T 8059, aligned with the IEC 62552 series) is consistent with international measurement practice. Chinese energy grades are not directly equivalent to any Uzbek/GOST-derived class without re-mapping, but the shared IEC 62552 measurement basis means the underlying test data is broadly portable.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效至5级最低门槛）及年耗电量限值。该标准为强制性，由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识（CEL）在NDRC/SAMR标识体系下管理；底层试验方法（GB/T 8059，参照IEC 62552系列）与国际测量惯例一致。中国能效等级未经重新映射不直接等同于任何乌方/GOST衍生等级，但共享的IEC 62552测量基础意味着底层检测数据具有较好的可移植性。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效至5級最低門檻）及年耗電量限值。該標準為強制性，由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識（CEL）在NDRC/SAMR標識體系下管理；底層試驗方法（GB/T 8059，參照IEC 62552系列）與國際測量慣例一致。中國能效等級未經重新映射不直接等同於任何烏方/GOST衍生等級，但共享的IEC 62552測量基礎意味著底層檢測數據具有較好的可移植性。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test methods (aligned with the IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Unlike the EU's EEI/EPREL hard gate, Uzbekistan's energy-efficiency requirements are programme- and standard-driven and may be less prescriptive, but the gaps are: (1) Different energy-class basis — a Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not map directly to a GOST-derived or national Uzbek energy class; if an energy class or label is required, the value must be re-expressed using the locally referenced framework. (2) Measurement portability — because both sides reference the IEC 62552 series, existing test data is broadly usable, but the report must support the locally required class/threshold calculation. (3) Programme requirements evolve — importers should confirm whether a minimum energy-performance standard (MEPS) or energy-labelling obligation currently applies to imported refrigerators under the prevailing national programme before shipment. There is no EPREL-style mandatory pre-registration database obligation. [NOTE: The current applicability of a specific MEPS/energy-label requirement to imported household refrigerators should be confirmed against Lex.uz and O'zStandart before regulatory submissions.]
gap.zh: 与欧盟EEI/EPREL硬性门槛不同，乌兹别克斯坦的能效要求以计划和标准驱动，规定性可能较弱，但差距在于：（1）能效等级基础不同——中国GB 12021.2等级不能直接映射到GOST衍生或乌方国家能效等级；若要求能效等级或标签，须采用本地引用框架重新表达数值。（2）测量可移植性——由于双方均引用IEC 62552系列，现有检测数据基本可用，但报告须支撑本地所需的等级/门槛计算。（3）计划要求会演进——进口商应在发货前确认现行国家计划下是否对进口电冰箱适用最低能效标准（MEPS）或能效标识义务。不存在EPREL式的强制预注册数据库义务。【注：特定MEPS/能效标识要求对进口家用电冰箱的当前适用性，应在监管提交前对照Lex.uz及O'zStandart确认。】
gap.zht: 與歐盟EEI/EPREL硬性門檻不同，烏茲別克的能效要求以計畫和標準驅動，規定性可能較弱，但差距在於：（1）能效等級基礎不同——中國GB 12021.2等級不能直接映射到GOST衍生或烏方國家能效等級；若要求能效等級或標籤，須採用本地引用框架重新表達數值。（2）測量可移植性——由於雙方均引用IEC 62552系列，現有檢測數據基本可用，但報告須支撐本地所需的等級/門檻計算。（3）計畫要求會演進——進口商應在發貨前確認現行國家計畫下是否對進口電冰箱適用最低能效標準（MEPS）或能效標識義務。不存在EPREL式的強制預登記數據庫義務。【注：特定MEPS/能效標識要求對進口家用電冰箱的當前適用性，應在監管提交前對照Lex.uz及O'zStandart確認。】

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — energy-efficiency obligations depend on the prevailing national energy-saving programme and any applicable MEPS/energy-label requirement; measurement uses the IEC 62552-series adoption. Confirm current applicability with O'zStandart before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uzbekistan addresses refrigerator energy efficiency through national energy-saving programmes and IEC 62552-based O'zDSt standards rather than the EU EEI/EPREL system. There is no EPREL-style pre-registration database. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not map directly to the local class basis, but IEC 62552 test data is broadly portable. Confirm any currently applicable MEPS or energy-labelling obligation with O'zStandart before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦通过国家节能计划和基于IEC 62552的O'zDSt标准管理电冰箱能效，而非欧盟EEI/EPREL体系。不存在EPREL式预注册数据库。中国GB 12021.2等级不能直接映射到本地等级基础，但IEC 62552检测数据基本可移植。请在发货前向O'zStandart确认当前是否适用任何MEPS或能效标识义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克通過國家節能計畫和基於IEC 62552的O'zDSt標準管理電冰箱能效，而非歐盟EEI/EPREL體系。不存在EPREL式預登記數據庫。中國GB 12021.2等級不能直接映射到本地等級基礎，但IEC 62552檢測數據基本可移植。請在發貨前向O'zStandart確認當前是否適用任何MEPS或能效標識義務。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — National Energy-Class Marking vs China Energy Label
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——国家能效等级标识与中国能效标识对照
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——國家能效等級標識與中國能效標識對照

summary.en: Where energy labelling applies to household refrigerators in Uzbekistan, it is implemented under national rules referencing a GOST-derived energy-class scale rather than the EU rescaled A-to-G label, and it is administered in coordination with O'zStandart and the responsible energy authorities rather than through a central pre-registration database such as EPREL. The label and any accompanying product information must be presented in the language required for the Uzbek market and must be supported by IEC 62552-based measurement data. Because energy-labelling obligations in Uzbekistan are programme-dependent and have evolved over time, suppliers and importers must verify whether a mandatory energy label is currently required for imported refrigerators, the exact class scale referenced, and the format/language requirements before market placement.
summary.zh: 在乌兹别克斯坦对家用电冰箱适用能效标识时，依据引用GOST衍生能效等级体系的国家规则实施，而非欧盟重新调整的A至G标签，并与O'zStandart及相关能源主管部门协调管理，而非通过EPREL等中央预注册数据库。标签及任何随附产品信息须以乌方市场所需语言呈现，并以基于IEC 62552的测量数据为支撑。由于乌兹别克斯坦的能效标识义务取决于计划且历经演变，供应商和进口商须在投放市场前核实当前是否对进口电冰箱强制要求能效标签、所引用的具体等级体系，以及格式/语言要求。
summary.zht: 在烏茲別克對家用電冰箱適用能效標識時，依據引用GOST衍生能效等級體系的國家規則實施，而非歐盟重新調整的A至G標籤，並與O'zStandart及相關能源主管部門協調管理，而非通過EPREL等中央預登記數據庫。標籤及任何隨附產品資訊須以烏方市場所需語言呈現，並以基於IEC 62552的測量數據為支撐。由於烏茲別克的能效標識義務取決於計畫且歷經演變，供應商和進口商須在投放市場前核實當前是否對進口電冰箱強制要求能效標籤、所引用的具體等級體系，以及格式/語言要求。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan national energy-labelling rules — where applicable, referencing a GOST-derived energy-class scale (administered with O'zStandart and the responsible energy authorities)
O'zDSt adoption of IEC 62552-series — measurement basis for any declared energy class
Uzbek market language requirements — product information and any energy label must be in the required language

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR. The grade is self-declared based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no central pre-registration database analogous to EPREL. The Chinese CEL is in Chinese and references the Chinese 1-to-5 grade system, so it does not serve as an Uzbek energy label even where the underlying IEC 62552 measurement data is shared.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。等级依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明；不存在类似EPREL的中央预注册数据库。中国能效标识为中文并引用中国1至5级体系，故即便共享底层IEC 62552测量数据，亦不能充当乌方能效标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。等級依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明；不存在類似EPREL的中央預登記數據庫。中國能效標識為中文並引用中國1至5級體系，故即便共享底層IEC 62552測量數據，亦不能充當烏方能效標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The Chinese CEL cannot serve as an Uzbek energy label: (1) Different scale — China uses a 1-to-5 grade; any Uzbek energy class follows a GOST-derived scale, requiring re-expression of the declared class even though the IEC 62552 measurement data can be re-used. (2) Language — the label and product information must be in the language required for the Uzbek market, not Chinese. (3) Administration — there is no EPREL-style central pre-registration; instead, conformity (and any energy-class declaration) is established through the O'zStandart certificate/declaration and held by the in-country importer/representative. (4) Conditional applicability — whether a mandatory energy label is currently required for imported refrigerators depends on the prevailing national programme and should be confirmed before market placement. [NOTE: The current mandatory-vs-voluntary status of refrigerator energy labelling in Uzbekistan should be confirmed against Lex.uz and O'zStandart before regulatory submissions.]
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不能充当乌方能效标签：（1）体系不同——中国采用1至5级；乌方任何能效等级遵循GOST衍生体系，即便可复用IEC 62552测量数据，仍须重新表达所声明的等级。（2）语言——标签及产品信息须以乌方市场所需语言呈现，而非中文。（3）管理方式——不存在EPREL式中央预注册；合规（及任何能效等级声明）通过O'zStandart证书/声明建立，并由境内进口商/代表持有。（4）适用性取决于条件——当前是否对进口电冰箱强制要求能效标签取决于现行国家计划，应在投放市场前确认。【注：乌兹别克斯坦电冰箱能效标识当前为强制还是自愿，应在监管提交前对照Lex.uz及O'zStandart确认。】
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不能充當烏方能效標籤：（1）體系不同——中國採用1至5級；烏方任何能效等級遵循GOST衍生體系，即便可複用IEC 62552測量數據，仍須重新表達所聲明的等級。（2）語言——標籤及產品資訊須以烏方市場所需語言呈現，而非中文。（3）管理方式——不存在EPREL式中央預登記；合規（及任何能效等級聲明）通過O'zStandart證書/聲明建立，並由境內進口商/代表持有。（4）適用性取決於條件——當前是否對進口電冰箱強制要求能效標籤取決於現行國家計畫，應在投放市場前確認。【注：烏茲別克電冰箱能效標識當前為強制還是自願，應在監管提交前對照Lex.uz及O'zStandart確認。】

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — energy-label applicability depends on the prevailing national programme; where required, a GOST-derived energy class is declared using IEC 62552-based data and presented in the required language. Confirm current status with O'zStandart before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Any Uzbek energy label uses a GOST-derived class scale and the required local language, supported by IEC 62552 data and held via the O'zStandart certificate/declaration and the in-country importer — there is no EPREL-style central registry. The Chinese 1-to-5 CEL does not substitute. Confirm whether a mandatory energy label currently applies to imported refrigerators with O'zStandart before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌方任何能效标签采用GOST衍生等级体系及所需本地语言，以IEC 62552数据为支撑，并通过O'zStandart证书/声明及境内进口商持有——不存在EPREL式中央注册库。中国1至5级能效标识不能替代。请在投放市场前向O'zStandart确认当前是否对进口电冰箱适用强制能效标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏方任何能效標籤採用GOST衍生等級體系及所需本地語言，以IEC 62552數據為支撐，並通過O'zStandart證書/聲明及境內進口商持有——不存在EPREL式中央註冊庫。中國1至5級能效標識不能替代。請在投放市場前向O'zStandart確認當前是否對進口電冰箱適用強制能效標籤。
